item.name: Wyvern Horn
item.description: This heavy horn emits a bellowing blare that summons your trained wyvern mount.

mount.name: Wyvern
mount.action: Summon forth your wyvern, master of the skies and forever-loyal servant.
mount.description: Fifty score years ago, this wyvern made a pact with a knight to aid in vanquishing evil from the skies. Even now, long after the knight's passing, the wyvern has kept that promise, ever circling the heavens─ignoring the calls of his brethren to take up arms against mankind.
mount.tooltip:
A wyvern... I'd only ever
heard stories about them.
- Saintrelmaux
